name: Lemon Mustard Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt and pepper the chicken breasts.
2. Marinate the breasts in lemonade for one hour. Drain and reserve the lemonade for sauce.
3. Pat the breasts dry and coat with mustard.
4. Combine bread crumbs and nuts.
5. Dip each chicken breast into beaten egg, then into the bread crumb-nut mixture.
6. Chill for 2 to 3 hours.
7. Heat 1/2 inch sunflower oil in a frying pan; add walnut oil.
8. Fry the chicken breasts for 10 to 12 minutes, turning once. Transfer to a serving platter and keep warm.
9. Pour all but 1 1/2 tbsp of oil from the pan into a saucepan.
10. Stir in flour and cook for about 1 minute.
11. Add reserved lemonade and broth. Cook down rapidly to about 3/4 cup.
12. Add cream, stirring constantly, and strain into the saucepan.
13. Heat well and swirl in mustard. Season to taste.
14. Pour over the chicken and serve. Serves 4.
